title: STRIDE_IO
subtitle: GAMIFIED GPS TRACKER
description: High-precision mobile ecosystem for fitness enthusiasts. Features real-time GPS pathing, social competitive leaderboards, and neural-link health telemetry integration.
problem: Existing trackers lack low-latency synchronization and meaningful user engagement through gamification.

title: NEXIO_MARKETPLACE
subtitle: ENTERPRISE B2B PORTAL
description: Cloud-native marketplace architected for high-volume inventory management and secure server-side transaction processing. Scalable infrastructure for global deployments.
problem: Legacy B2B systems suffer from monolithic bottlenecks and insecure data handling at scale.

title: ASR_ENGINE
subtitle: NEURAL SPEECH PROCESSOR
description: Advanced Automatic Speech Recognition engine utilizing transformer architectures for extreme accuracy in noisy environments. Real-time audio feature extraction.
problem: Real-time speech-to-text often degrades significantly in non-studio acoustic environments.
